zh.title: 以太坊/美元技术分析：短线偏弱震荡整理
zh.content:
当前ETH/USD维持窄幅震荡，价格运行于2073美元附近，24小时波动极小，显示市场观望情绪浓厚。整体走势仍处于短线弱势结构，价格低于20日均线2086美元，表明多头动能暂未恢复，短期趋势偏空整理。

从技术指标来看，MACD维持负值区域，说明空头力量仍占主导，市场存在进一步回调压力。虽然RSI数据暂缺，但结合当前低波动状态与均线压制，预计短期内仍以震荡偏弱节奏为主，缺乏明显趋势突破信号。

关键支撑位关注2070美元，一旦跌破，可能进一步测试2055美元区域；上方阻力则集中在2086美元及2100美元整数关口。若价格无法有效站稳20日均线，则反弹空间或受到限制，市场仍需等待新的放量信号确认方向。

交易策略方面，短线建议以高位轻仓做空思路为主，靠近2085至2090美元区域可关注压力表现。激进交易者可在2070美元附近观察短线反弹机会，但需严格控制止损，避免震荡行情带来的反复风险。

en.title: Ethereum vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Ethereum is trading near 2073.43, holding within a narrow intraday range between 2071.89 and 2076.57. Price action remains slightly bearish in the short term, as ETH continues to trade below the 20-day simple moving average at 2086.69. This positioning suggests momentum remains weak despite the relatively flat 24-hour change of 0.04%. Buyers appear hesitant to reclaim higher levels, while sellers continue defending the area around the 2085–2090 zone.

The MACD reading at -8.43 reflects negative momentum and indicates that bearish pressure still dominates the broader short-term structure. Although the RSI value is unavailable, the current consolidation pattern suggests the market may be approaching a neutral-to-oversold condition. The inability to establish sustained movement above the SMA(20) reinforces caution, especially as trading volume and volatility remain compressed. A breakout from this tight range will likely determine the next directional move.

Immediate support is located near 2070, which aligns closely with the session low. If this level breaks decisively, ETH could extend losses toward the psychologically important 2050 region, with further downside potential near 2025. On the upside, resistance is visible around 2087 at the moving average, followed by a stronger barrier near 2100. A successful recovery above these levels could improve short-term sentiment and encourage renewed bullish participation.

Short-term traders may consider waiting for confirmation before entering aggressive positions. Conservative bullish setups would favor a clean move above 2087 with sustained momentum, while bearish traders may look for weakness below 2070 to target lower support zones. Given the muted volatility and negative MACD structure, disciplined risk management remains essential. Tight stop-loss placement and smaller position sizing are advisable until clearer directional strength develops.
